task: Execute Clerk Billing integration plan (Iteration 4 — custom UI path)

stories.title: Document Step 0 spike checklist (human-gated)
stories.note: Delivered: .omc/human-tasks/step-0-spike-checklist.md. User must run the checklist against their Clerk dev instance and record the outcome in progress.txt.

stories.title: Add requireAuth() to 5 unguarded mutations in convex/studio.ts
stories.note: Shipped in commit cc50883. Includes ownership checks via assertOwnsIfTracked helper (legacy pre-auth rows with no userId allowed through for backward compat).

stories.title: Add requireAuth() to 7 unguarded mutations in convex/board.ts
stories.note: Shipped. Auth fence only — board is explicitly out-of-scope for billing gates.

stories.title: Create capability registry + plan config + types
stories.note: convex/lib/billing/capabilities.ts + planConfig.ts. Both Basic and Pro have all 5 capabilities; differentiation is volume (productLimit 5/20, monthlyCredits 100/500).

stories.title: Create versioned claim extractor + BillingProvider interface + Clerk impl
stories.note: claims.ts + provider.ts + provider.clerk.ts. v1 claim format locked in; add v2 branch if Clerk changes format.

stories.title: Add billingEvents schema + public billing helpers index
stories.note: convex/schema.ts updated. convex/lib/billing/index.ts exports getBillingContext, requireCapability, requireProductLimit, requireCredit (with count param), recordCreditUse, getBillingStatus query. All honor BILLING_ENABLED kill switch.

stories.title: Wire billing enforcement into products.ts, studio.ts, productImages.ts
stories.note: Committed b9d3b07. createProduct (limit), removeProductBackground (cap, no credit), generateFromProduct (cap + batch + N credits), generateVariations (cap + N credits), submitRun (same as generateFromProduct), retryGeneration (1 credit), removeImageBackground (cap). Build green.

stories.title: Add getBillingStatus Convex query + billing-gates test
stories.note: Partial: getBillingStatus query shipped in US-007. billing-gates.test.ts NOT YET written — no test framework in devDependencies (only @playwright/test for E2E). Deferred: add vitest + write consistency test (registry ↔ planConfig ↔ mutation enforcement) in a follow-up session, or rely on TypeScript compile-time catching of CAPABILITIES typos.

stories.title: Build custom /pricing route with usePlans + Mantine plan cards
stories.note: NOT STARTED — significant UI work. Needs its own session. Requires verifying @clerk/react/experimental exports first (Step 0 spike).

stories.title: Build custom /checkout route with CheckoutProvider + useCheckout + PaymentElement
stories.note: NOT STARTED — significant UI work. ~1-2 days including Stripe appearance mapping.

stories.title: Studio UI capability gating + credits indicator
stories.note: NOT STARTED — getBillingStatus query ready; need <CreditsIndicator /> + <Show> wrappers in studio.$productId.tsx and studio.index.tsx.

stories.title: Update __root.tsx nav with Pricing + Billing links behind VITE_BILLING_ENABLED
stories.note: NOT STARTED — small change, do after US-010 and US-012 routes exist.

stories.title: Pin Clerk packages exact + document env vars
stories.note: @clerk/react pinned to 6.4.2 exact. @clerk/clerk-js is not a direct dep (uses @clerk/clerk-react transitively); pnpm-lock.yaml captures the exact resolved version. .env.local.example and .omc/human-tasks/env-setup.md document the dual kill switch (VITE_BILLING_ENABLED + BILLING_ENABLED).

stories.title: Document Step 6 rollout checklist (human-gated)
stories.note: Delivered: .omc/human-tasks/step-6-rollout-checklist.md with Option X (comp Basic) as default.

stories.title: Final architect verification
stories.note: PENDING — run after all code stories complete. Current backend-only slice (US-002/003/005/006/007/008/016) could get a focused architect pass now, before UI stories resume.

session_summary: Backend foundation complete. 10/18 stories passing (5 code + 5 docs/config). UI stories US-010-015 scoped out of this session — they're 3-5 days of focused Mantine + Clerk experimental hooks work. US-009 test deferred (no test framework installed). Next session: verify Step 0 spike passes, then start US-010.
